name: Almond Cookies/TVFN
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg, vanilla, and almond extract.
4. Sift the flour over the top of the mixture, then add the salt, almonds, and unpeeled almonds, folding to combine thoroughly.
5. Roll small pieces of the dough into balls about 1 inch in diameter, enclosing a whole almond in each one.
6. Place the cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until lightly browned, on the center rack of the oven.
8. Allow the cookies to cool slightly before transferring them to racks to cool further.
9. Once cooled enough to handle, roll half of the cookies in cocoa powder and the other half in confectioners sugar.
10. Serve warm or return the remaining cookies to the rack to dry. Makes about 28 cookies.
